feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Man of Steel, Heart of Glass
entry.summary:
Author: glitter_gutz

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,493Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 40

Summary: Bruce hates how Clark treats him like a petulant child, but he craves the adrenaline of being with the city's golden boy. Their intimacy is a battlefield. And it's marked by biting, scratching, and grip so tight it bruises. Proud marks that prove they were the ones to break the other’s composure. It’s a toxic, addictive cycle where the only time they feel truly close is when they are tearing each other apart and putting themselves back together.

entry.title: [Podfic] ship-to-ship combat
entry.summary:
Author: DevilWithABirdDress

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 264Chapters: 8/13Kudos: 66

Summary: Clark, in an attempt to make some spare cash, unintentionally stumbles into the world of superhero fanfiction, becomes a prolific writer for Gotham's OTP, and tries his best to fend off rival fans who want him to convert to superbat instead.Podfic of ship-to-ship combat by pomeloquat.

entry.title: Boundaries and ways not to cross them
entry.summary:
Author: morallywrong

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,375Chapters: 7/8Kudos: 286

Summary: Bruce had known all day what was coming at him. Like watching a car crash in slow motion, he was unable to do anything about the situation.---Bruce was a man of many faces and he took care of whom he showed which side of himself. When the Justice League gives him the ultimatum to reveal himself or leave the League, he leaves. If only Superman, the man he loved, had shown him support... Instead, the other hero couldn't even look him in the eye.

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 65,799Chapters: 13/30Kudos: 361

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: Dead Reckoning Part Two
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 76,362Chapters: 5/12Kudos: 7

Summary: Aven is living on borrowed time, his body harboring something intelligent, dangerous, and very much awake. As powerful corporations circle and a desperate mission pushes him deep into enemy territory, survival demands disguises, secrets, and impossible trust. Love offers brief sanctuary, even as it makes everything more fragile. Hunted, exposed, and running out of room to run, Aven must face the truth:staying alive may cost more than dying ever would...

entry.title: The beat of your heart (And the beat of my wings)
entry.summary:
Author: Hubcap_Stealer_YumYum

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,922Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 54

Summary: Who knows? Maybe he’d even earn brownie points with the Batman for being able to take care of his precious city quickly.·˖✶𓆩🦇𓆪✶˖·˳.He wanted the Alien out of his city and he wanted him out NOW. Bruce Wayne, also known as the batman, watched over his city from above and violently repelled any intruders. That is, until a man with a blinding smile who can fly just as high as he can shows up, and a little boy who watched his parents die shortly after. TLDR: Bruce has bat wings and they attract the empathetic Kal'El, who helps him be a better person and father. This will go through the entire bat family until we catch 'em all

entry.title: in a land of make believe (that don't believe in me)
entry.summary:
Author: snapdragonsuplex

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,332Chapters: 4/4Kudos: 751

Summary: The kid blinks, then goes rigid. He slowly turns, and Clark– Clark’s stomach drops. Because he knows those eyes. He’s seen those eyes every day for the past nearly seven months. Those bright blue eyes that are an exact copy of his own. “... Conner?” He hears himself say. “Shit,” The kid– Conner– swears. “Dad’s gonna kill me.”------------------------An encounter with time-traveling robots brings a sixteen-year-old Conner to the present day. Clark and Bruce, predictably, are completely out of their depth.

entry.title: Joyride
entry.summary:
Author: TheCrimsonCritic

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,606Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 145

Summary: "As if the man could sense Bruce’s ogling, Clark looked directly at him as the bull jerked particularly hard, sending the reporter’s back into a sinuous arch. Bruce was a man who had a turbulent “relationship” with Clark, but he was still just a man. A man who wanted the reporter-turned-mechanical-bull rider. Bad." OR Bruce sees Clark ride a mechanical bull at a themed gala wants Clark's cookie BAD. Before AND after discovering Clark's identity as Superman.

entry.title: All The Things We Cannot See
entry.summary:
Author: Ivasa

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,161Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 105

Summary: People disappear in Gotham every day. Batman finds them. That’s the job. But information has a price, and sometimes it requires becoming someone else entirely. A different face, a different name, a different life - Bruce is good at it. To him, wearing a disguise is almost easier than being himself. This case should have been simple. It stops being simple the moment a rookie reporter from Metropolis decides that Matches Malone is exactly the kind of source he’s been looking for.

entry.title: Undisclosed Desires
entry.summary:
Author: lmaosobsquietly

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,989Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 33

Summary: Clark Kent has a habit of seeing the good in people. It’s what makes him a great reporter—and what makes Bruce Wayne a problem. Bruce doesn’t make sense. Not as a careless billionaire, not as the man Clark meets in quieter moments, and certainly not as the person Clark finds himself thinking about long after their conversations end. Bruce Wayne didn't plan on falling for a journalist with too many questions, and a smile that sees right through him. Bruce knows exactly why Clark is confused. He knows Clark is getting close to something he shouldn’t see, asking questions that don’t have safe answers. It’s a dangerous kind of attention—one Bruce should shut down immediately. Instead, he lets Clark in. Slowly. Carefully. Too much. As their connection deepens into something softer, something undeniable, the truth looms between them. Because Clark doesn’t know who Bruce really is. And Bruce is starting to realize he doesn’t want to keep pretending he doesn’t care.

entry.title: I Want to Know You
entry.summary:
Author: dueefbigfard

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,915Chapters: 1/6Kudos: 29

Summary: Clark heard the static of Nightwing’s earpiece crackle to life as Oracle started talking. “There’s an attempted breaking and entering, half a mile south of you. Can you—” “On it.” Dick sprang to his feet and rolled his shoulders back, and suddenly Nightwing wasn’t just a story Clark had shared with a little boy all those years ago. “That’s my cue. See you around, Supes.” “Of course. Real quick, though,” Clark added, a little desperate. “If he’s not like…that, then what is Bruce actually like when he’s drunk?” “My friend,” Dick said, holding Clark by the shoulders in mock seriousness. “Perhaps one day you will know—but today is not that day.” “Right, of course, sure.” Bats and their secrets. “Be careful out there, buddy.” “Always am,” Dick said, lying through his teeth as he dropped ever so casually from the building.   5 times Clark thought Bruce was drunk, and one time he actually was

entry.title: Must've Been The Wind
entry.summary:
Author: NotCassia

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 933Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 196

Summary: Off to the more quiet side of the scene—or as quiet as it could get—there's Batman and Superman. Batman's gaze is fixed solely on the holographic display projecting from his gauntlet and the contents of it's information. Presumably explaining said contents to Superman. Superman, who is looking at said contents from beside Batman, occasionally nodding in response to whatever he's saying. They're too far from whomever is taking this video for them to be heard, but one could get a good go at reading their lips. The most obvious thing said is by Superman, “Sorry, I didn't catch that," his lips betray, as he steps closer than he already is. Lowering his head and drawing his ear closer to Batman's mouth. >Anna @getannabortion [edited gif of Superman leaning in closer towards Batman—closer than he already is, captioned «Sorry, I didn't catch that»] he has super hearing 😐😐🥀          79k likes  142 replies >>Superman ✓     @officialsuperman REPLYING TO @getannabortion a man can't even shoot his shot anymore 💔💔          187k likes  401 replies >>>Anna      @getannabortion REPLYING TO @officialsuperman HELLOOO??? 😭😭💔💔💔             39k likes  97 replies

entry.title: sweet deal
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 18,480Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 144

Summary: By summoning a forgotten Kryptonian rite, Bruce Wayne ensures a peace treaty for Earth and its alien conquerors. All he has to do is join the harem of the House of El, and spend the rest of his days on a dangerous alien planet, but it’s not like anyone will miss him anyway.The only problem will be getting their stubborn Prince to cooperate.

entry.title: And I'll Do It Over Again (Hopefully Better This Time)
entry.summary:
Author: god_i_love_fanfics

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,173Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 170

Summary: If you told one Damian Wayne he’d find a small, pit-touched child shivering under an overpass in a pool of what appeared to be Lazarus water tainted only by rainwater and blood, he’d probably question your sanity. Of course, he’d keep what you’d said in mind, but ultimately regard the notion as the nonsensical babbling of an unstable fool. After all, people, especially children, don’t just bleed Pit waters. But that’s exactly what he’s looking at, isn’t it?

  • so yeah probably

entry.title: The Little Knight
entry.summary:
Author: Flutterheart

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 331,942Chapters: 47/?Kudos: 96

Summary: Bruce's mental health is at its lowest, and Clark figures out a coping mechanism that isn't destructive.   TLDR Little Bruce and his caregiver Clark. DON'T LIKE DON'T READ!
